architecture.summary: Sync routing via resolveSyncTarget, three-phase resolution, no new architecture needed

integrations.summary: GitHub API, JIRA API, ADO API — all existing integrations, testing routing only

ui-ux.summary: No UI — this is a backend sync verification experiment

performance.summary: No performance concerns — single resolver call per sync operation

security.summary: Uses existing auth tokens, no new credentials needed

edge-cases.summary: Unknown project fallback to global, partial sync config, undefined project name
